---
title: Kreuzungschema
format: html
---



```{ojs}
//| eval: true
//| echo: false
//| output: false
//| results: hide

function makeGametes(parent) {
    return parent.split("");
}

function crossParents(parent1, parent2) {
    let gametes1 = makeGametes(parent1);
    let gametes2 = makeGametes(parent2);
    let offspring = Array.from(
        {length: gametes1.length * gametes2.length},
        () => ({
            gamete1: null,
            gamete2: null,
            offspring: null
        })
    );
    let offspringIndex = 0;
    for (let index1 = 0; index1 < gametes1.length; index1++) {
        for (let index2 = 0; index2 < gametes2.length; index2++) {
            offspring[offspringIndex] = {
                gamete1: gametes1[index1],
                gamete2: gametes2[index2],
                offspring: gametes1[index1] + gametes2[index2]
            };
            offspringIndex++;
        }       
    }
    return offspring;
}

```

```{ojs}
//| output: true
//| echo: false

viewof parent1 = Inputs.text({
    label: "Allele des Elternteils1",
    value: "Aa",
    placeholder: "Gib hier Allele ein",
    spellcheck: false,
    pattern: "[a-zA-Z]{2}",
    minlength: 2,
maxlength: 2,
requirment: true
})
```

```{ojs}
//| output: true
//| echo: false

viewof parent2 = Inputs.text({
    label: "Allele des Elternteils2",
    value: "Aa",
    placeholder: "Gib hier Allele ein",
    spellcheck: false,
    pattern: "[a-zA-Z]{2}",
    minlength: 2,
maxlength: 2,
requirment: true
})
```

```{ojs}
//|output: true
//|echo: false

gametes1 = makeGametes(parent1);
gametes1

```

```{ojs}
//|output: true
//|echo: false

gametes2 = makeGametes(parent2);
gametes2

```

```{ojs}
//|output: true 
//|echo: false
offspring = crossParents(parent1, parent2);
offspring
```
